content:
# Least Squares Fitting

**Summary**: An optimization method used to find the best fit for a mathematical model (e.g., Ricker wavelet) to observed data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] applied least-squares fitting of Ricker wavelets to estimate and subtract diffracted signals from seismic traces.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Least-squares fitting was used to estimate the signal s(t) in a window centered on the diffraction hyperbola. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 62]])
